title: Fix issue #32120: Strip <think> tags in parse_json_markdown to support reasoning models
body_text:
This PR fixes issue #32120 where reasoning models (like DeepSeek-R1 or Claude 3.7 Thinking) output including `<think>...</think>` tags caused `JsonOutputParser` to fail. 

The `parse_json_markdown` utility now strips these tags both before and after markdown extraction to ensure robust parsing of structured output from reasoning-capable models.
